data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of not hiding slots within 48 hours, but the evidence does not confirm compliance with this requirement. The linked use case indicates that the executive coach can set hiding features, but there is no evidence that explicitly states how the system handles slots within the 48-hour window. This lack of concrete evidence leads to a conclusion of a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence confirming that slots are not hidden within 48 hours.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
